# 📦 Distribution Files

This directory contains pre-built binaries of **oh-my-MindBranch v1.0.0**.

## 📥 Download Options

| File | Size | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| **`oh-my-MindBranch-1.0.0-setup.exe`** | ~80 MB | NSIS installer · Recommended for most users · **Choose install location** · Creates Start Menu & Desktop shortcuts · Includes uninstaller |
| **`oh-my-MindBranch-1.0.0-portable.zip`** | ~110 MB | Portable version · No installation required · Extract anywhere · Perfect for USB drives |
| **`win-unpacked/`** | ~220 MB | Unpacked directory · Use for inspection or custom packaging |

## 🔍 SHA256 Checksums

```
715C63690D9364D260177837BCD23E69DD72B4BA14376ADA06623377203A47ED  oh-my-MindBranch-1.0.0-setup.exe
0E2E683FDF13D5C91B96ABBECFDBA7359144935A5E8D83E5FC66CC54C5C64D63  oh-my-MindBranch-1.0.0-portable.zip
```

Verify on Windows with PowerShell:
```powershell
Get-FileHash -Algorithm SHA256 oh-my-MindBranch-1.0.0-setup.exe
```

## 🛠️ Installation

### Option 1: Installer (Recommended)
1. Download `oh-my-MindBranch-1.0.0-setup.exe`
2. Run the installer
3. **Choose your installation directory** (e.g., `D:\Apps\oh-my-MindBranch\`)
4. Choose whether to create desktop shortcut
5. Click Install
6. Launch from Start Menu or Desktop shortcut

### Option 2: Portable
1. Download `oh-my-MindBranch-1.0.0-portable.zip`
2. Extract to any directory (e.g., `C:\Apps\oh-my-MindBranch\`)
3. Run `oh-my-MindBranch.exe` directly

## 📋 System Requirements

| | Minimum | Recommended |
|---|---------|-------------|
| **OS** | Windows 7 (64-bit) | Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit) |
| **CPU** | Dual-core 1.5 GHz | Quad-core 2.0 GHz+ |
| **RAM** | 2 GB | 4 GB+ |
| **Disk** | 300 MB free | 500 MB free |

## 🐛 Report Issues

Found a bug? Please [open an issue](https://github.com/yourname/oh-my-MindBranch/issues) with:
- Your Windows version
- The exact error message
- Steps to reproduce
